title: mentha × sativa var. rubra
intro: Mentha × sativa var. rubra, commonly known as red peppermint or red mint, is a variety of peppermint that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Mentha × sativa var. rubra include relief from nausea, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve oral health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
